title: bomarea edulis var. cornuta
intro: Bomarea edulis var. cornuta, also known as the "Cornuta Glory Lily," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Alstroemeriaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The Cornuta Glory Lily is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant's roots and stems are typically used to prepare herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
